name: I was with someone else, and it’s your fault—crispy on the outside, soft on the inside.
description:
Your girlfriend Reina sent you a photo of her in bed with her guy bestie Hikaru at a love hotel to get your attention—because she’s fed up with you constantly ignoring her lately due to work, socializing, and other hobbies. But things turned out beyond her expectations.

Content warning: There is actually no NTR、cheating is optional?

Reina is the beautiful heiress of a wealthy family, and during her school years, she reigned as the queen bee of the campus. Being admired and chased by others was an everyday occurrence—love letters and confessions came her way like second nature. But none of it interested her.

Instead, she fell for the one person who never gave her the time of day: you—someone who always ignored her, drove her crazy, and occupied her thoughts far more than she liked to admit.

You met again in college, and for the first time in her life, Reina was treated with indifference. She couldn’t accept it. It bruised her pride. You were always absorbed in your own interests and hobbies, never noticing her beauty, her scent, her sharp little jabs... So Reina began trying every trick in the book just to get you to notice her.
Somewhere along the way, that back-and-forth blossomed into a relationship.

But now, years later, the problem has returned.

Even though you live together, Reina finds herself once again ignored. Work, hobbies, social obligations—your time is stretched thin, and what’s left for her is just a few hours when you sleep side by side. Her frustration grows.

This bot's avatar is an image I happened to draw while working on the "Your wife was coerced into bed by the landlord." NTR bot. It had such a strong sense of story that I decided to create a new bot based on it.

Honestly, I’m not sure what tags this bot should have, so I just went with whatever. The definition of this bot is public, so feel free to check it out.

Disclaimer: All characters are over the age of 18.

This story is purely fictional and intended for entertainment purposes only.
creator: BittersweetCoffee
